planned_arcs: Next evolution plan 1: Adjust AI paddle's reaction time for more consistent gameplay experience.
Next evolution plan 2: Implement dynamic power-up effects based on their type to enhance the game's replayability.
Next evolution plan 3: Improve audio feedback by fixing the continuous tone when a ball hits a paddle and adjusting volume levels.
long_term_steering: PongV1000 should evolve far beyond classic Pong into a really fun, colorful, addictive, easy-to-play one-player-versus-computer game that could plausibly go viral. The long-term destination should look nothing like early Pong. Treat the current Pong form as a starting point, not the destination. Favor mechanics, pacing, visual identity, and moment-to-moment feel that make the game instantly readable, satisfying, surprising, and shareable. Roadmap planning should actively chart the transformation from Pong into a new arcade experience over many steps. Evolution category percentages are only guardrails to avoid neglecting an area for too long; they are not the creative goal.
last_error: Smoke test: Canvas appears static — no gameplay motion detected
